items.title: Deterministic router for local and hosted LLMs
items.oneliner: Policy-based LLM router that sends prompts to local or hosted models with predictable rules, budgets, and fallback paths.

items.title: Two-node vLLM RDMA cluster walkthrough
items.oneliner: Step-by-step guide to build a low-latency two-node vLLM cluster with RDMA, Ray, RCCL, and Intel E810 NICs.

items.title: Benchmarks for six Go cache designs
items.oneliner: Benchmark-driven Go cache comparison showing 256-way sharding can deliver up to 8x higher multicore throughput.

items.title: CPU cache behavior explained with code
items.oneliner: Hands-on performance writeup showing how random memory access destroys throughput compared with linear scans and cache-friendly layouts.

items.title: LXC sandbox for risky X11 apps
items.oneliner: Practical Arch Linux guide for isolating browsers and other X11 apps in unprivileged LXC containers.

items.title: Linux key remapping with Keyd
items.oneliner: Simple Linux walkthrough for remapping broken or awkward keys system-wide using Keyd and one config file.

items.title: Interactive GameCube decompilation training course
items.oneliner: Browser-based course that teaches GameCube decompilation with graded exercises and 264 real functions to reverse into matching C.

items.title: Postgres planner advice in version 19
items.oneliner: New PostgreSQL module lets you capture planner advice strings and force join order or scan choices for query experiments.

items.title: Identity-aware access proxy without a VPN
items.oneliner: Open-source access proxy for protecting internal apps with identity, context, and policy checks instead of a corporate VPN.

items.title: Single-script static blogging from Bash
items.oneliner: One Bash script creates a Markdown-powered static blog with drafts, tags, and RSS on any Unix box.
